query:
-- Insert demo tenants if they don't exist
INSERT IGNORE INTO tenants (id, slug, company_name, industry, plan, is_active, is_nvc_platform, suspended, created_at)
VALUES
  (1, 'acme-hvac', 'Acme HVAC Services', 'hvac', 'professional', 1, 0, 0, NOW()),
  (2, 'plumb-pro', 'PlumbPro Solutions', 'plumbing', 'starter', 1, 0, 0, NOW()),
  (3, 'nvc360', 'NVC360 Platform', 'other', 'enterprise', 1, 1, 0, NOW());

-- Insert demo tenant users (dispatchers, admins, technicians)
INSERT IGNORE INTO tenant_users (tenant_id, role, name, email, password_hash, is_active, created_at)
VALUES
  (1, 'dispatcher', 'James Chen', 'dispatch@acmehvac.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1, NOW()),
  (1, 'agent', 'Mike Torres', 'tech@acmehvac.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1, NOW()),
  (2, 'manager', 'Lisa Park', 'admin@plumbpro.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1, NOW()),
  (3, 'manager', 'Dan Rosenblat', 'admin@nvc360.com', '$2a$12$placeholder', 1, NOW());

-- Insert merchant settings for demo tenants
INSERT IGNORE INTO merchant_settings (tenant_id, auto_allocation, created_at)
VALUES (1, 0, NOW()), (2, 0, NOW());
